effect.name: Fast Overdrive
effect.description:
Fast Overdrive (LADSPA 1196)
A simple overdrive. Compresses the extreme peaks to make a sound similar to an overdriven amplifier.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Drive Level
parameter.comment:
Controls the point at
which the signal starts to distort, and the degree of distortion.
